title: Journey A Stage 4 — Discovery Call Summary
description: Notes, pain points, budget, and timeline captured from discovery call

call_notes.description: Summary of call discussion (min 100 chars). Should capture key topics, client concerns, and positive signals

pain_points.description: Array of identified pain points (min 1 item). Each should be specific and actionable

budget.description: Budget mentioned (nullable, can be $0 if client didn't disclose). If present, must be >= 0

timeline.description: Timeline expectations in parseable format (30d, 60d, 90d, Q2, May 2026, urgent, asap, ongoing)

next_steps.description: Explicit next action agreed with client (follow-up email, proposal, second call, etc.)
